Nginx Proxy Manager：

docker run -d
--name=npm
-p 80:80
-p 81:81
-p 443:443
-v /home/npm/data:/data
-v /home/npm/letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
--restart=always
jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest
